mnemonics.title: Critical Section Requirements: M.P.B.
mnemonics.content: Mutual exclusion (only one thread at a time), Progress (no indefinite postponement), Bounded waiting (no starvation). All three must be satisfied for a correct solution.

mnemonics.title: Deadlock Coffman Conditions: M.H.N.C.
mnemonics.content: Mutual exclusion, Hold and wait, No preemption, Circular wait. All four must hold simultaneously for deadlock to occur. Break any one to prevent deadlock.

mnemonics.title: Semaphore Operations: P and V
mnemonics.content: P = Proberen (test/wait) = decrement, block if negative. V = Verhogen (increment/signal) = increment, wake a blocked thread. P is 'Please let me in', V is 'Vacate for the next one'.

mnemonics.title: Sync Primitives: L.S.B.C.M.
mnemonics.content: Locks (binary mutual exclusion), Semaphores (counting, resource pools), Barriers (wait for all), Condition variables (wait for state), Monitors (language-level auto-locking). Choose based on the coordination pattern.

mnemonics.title: Race Condition = Read-Modify-Write Problem
mnemonics.content: A race condition occurs when two threads Read a shared variable, Modify it independently, then Write back -- one update is lost. The fix: make the Read-Modify-Write sequence atomic using a lock.
